class.description: Probabilistic Roadmap (PRM) global planner. Samples collision-free milestones over the global costmap, connects nearby milestones with collision-free edges into a graph, adds the start and goal, and returns the shortest path found by Dijkstra search over the roadmap. Classical (non-learned) and not part of upstream Nav2. Throws NoValidPathCouldBeFound if start and goal are not connected in the roadmap.
